raw:
ISSUES:
- [severity:info] docs/claude-code-system-architecture.md:41 - 'Opus 4.6' version reference is likely an aspirational placeholder or typo for current Anthropic models (3.5/3.7).
- [severity:info] docs/claude-code-system-architecture.md:36 - 'sensitiveFileGuard' example list is not exhaustive; it should align with the project's read-only mandate for all *.properties files (e.g., app-shinhanvc, app-tibero).

VERDICT: looks-good.

SUMMARY: The documentation accurately maps the agentic ecosystem's safety hooks and KiiPS-specific guardrails, ensuring architectural alignment with the project's security and dark theme standards.

issues.text: docs/claude-code-system-architecture.md:41 - 'Opus 4.6' version reference is likely an aspirational placeholder or typo for current Anthropic models (3.5/3.7).

docs/claude-code-system-architecture.md:36 - 'sensitiveFileGuard' example list is not exhaustive; it should align with the project's read-only mandate for all *.properties files (e.g., app-shinhanvc, app-tibero).

summary: The documentation accurately maps the agentic ecosystem's safety hooks and KiiPS-specific guardrails, ensuring architectural alignment with the project's security and dark theme standards.
